auth.registerSub: Keep your diamonds in your account
auth.emailPasswordLength: Email and a password of at least 6 characters are required
auth.registerCheckEmail: Check your email; if required, confirm from the link, then sign in.

tokens.title: Diamonds
tokens.adLimit: You already claimed today’s ad reward. Try again tomorrow.
tokens.adError: Could not claim reward. Check connection or daily limit.
tokens.mockBuyBody: {{amount}} diamonds will be added (only if ALLOW_MOCK_PURCHASE is true on the server).
tokens.closedBody: Set ALLOW_MOCK_PURCHASE=true on the backend; real apps use App Store / Play billing.

app.fortuneCoffeeDesc: Discover your future from a cup photo
app.fortuneTarotDesc: Get your message from the cards
app.fortuneDreamDesc: Tell your dream, we’ll interpret it
app.astroHubTitle: What do you want to explore?
app.astroHubSubtitle: Plain words — no jargon required. You can go back and pick again anytime.
app.astroModeNatalDesc: The sky the moment you were born — your themes and patterns.
app.astroModeTransitDesc: How the current sky hits your chart. Coming soon — same birth data will power it.
app.astroModeSynastryDesc: Compatibility and chemistry between two birth charts. Coming soon.
app.astroComingBody: We’re still wiring this mode. For now, use Birth chart, or return to the menu to choose another path.
app.chartVisualHint: Wheel shows main planets, nodes, and a few points. The API computes a fuller set for the text.
app.maxPhotosBody: You can select up to {{max}} photos
app.galleryErrorBody: Could not pick a photo from the library
app.diamondBodyLong: You don’t have enough diamonds. Watch an ad or buy diamonds to get more.
app.fortuneReadError: The reading could not be loaded. Please try again.
app.fortuneInsufficientShort: You don’t have enough diamonds for this reading.
app.followUpBody: You need 1 diamond for a follow-up question
app.followUpError: The follow-up could not be sent
app.tarotAllDrawn: All cards are drawn. Shuffle again
app.tarotThreeReady: You’ve picked 3 cards — you can get the reading
app.tarotNeedShuffle: Shuffle and draw your cards first
app.tarotDiamondBody: You don’t have enough diamonds to read the tarot. Watch an ad or buy diamonds to get more.
app.tarotReadError: Tarot reading could not be loaded. Please try again.
app.astrologyFill: Please select birth date, time, and place
app.astrologyDiamondBody: You don’t have enough diamonds for a birth chart. Watch an ad or buy diamonds to get more.
app.chartError: The birth chart could not be calculated. Please try again.
app.dreamInsufficient: You need a diamond for a dream reading
app.streamMessageFail: Could not get a response. Please try again.
app.tarotStreamFail: The reading could not be loaded. Please try again.
app.welcomeKahve: Hello! I'm {{name}}. ☕ Upload a cup photo and I’ll read your fortune.
app.welcomeTarot: Hello! I'm {{name}}. 🔮 Choose 3 cards for past, present, and future.
app.welcomeRuya: Hello! I'm {{name}}. 💭 Tell me your dream (at least 20 characters).
app.userCoffeeUpload: I uploaded my coffee photos — please interpret.
app.birthInfoHint: Your chart is calculated with Swiss Ephemeris.
app.birthTimeZoneHint: We interpret time in your selected birth place (handles daylight saving for that region).
app.birthCountryHelper: Choose where you were born — the city list appears after this.
app.birthCitySelectCountryFirst: Pick a country above to see cities here.

falci.trait0: 30 years of readings in Kadıköy, tradition from her grandmother. Warm and intuitive.
falci.trait1: A small shop in Eminönü, 25 years of coffee readings. Sincere and direct.
falci.trait2: Grew up in Istanbul, dream interpretation from her grandfather. Empathetic and warm.
falci.trait3: 20 years in Üsküdar, tarot and coffee. Curious about Jung, deep readings.
falci.trait4: Beşiktaş — knows traditional symbols. Calm, wise style.
falci.trait5: From Anatolia to Istanbul, family tradition. Warm and trustworthy.
falci.trait6: 15 years with cards and dreams. Kind, thoughtful tone.
falci.trait7: Small shop in Kadıköy bazaar, sense of humor, reassuring.
falci.trait8: Dream work in the tradition of Ibn Sirin. Serious but kind.
falci.trait9: Tarot for 18 years, likes psychological depth.
